title: Chicken Strips: The Trials and Tribulations of Becoming a Garage Band
original_title: Chicken Strips: The Trials and Tribulations of Becoming a Garage Band
overview: When childhood best friends, Kyle, Steven, and Ruben are forced to perform in a music festival, conflicting priorities and visitors from the boys' past push their friendship to the breaking point.
